testcase.name: 1300-rule-node-rule-sets-testcase
Rule Node Rule Sets Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using rule nodes with tagged rule sets

variation.name: Rule node with tagged rule sets for period line-up
variation.description: Simple table with two rows (primary items m1, m2) and a single column (instant period 2001-12-31 / 2002-12-31). The periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The tags are used to select the period for each row.

variation.name: Rule node with tagged rule sets for period line-up, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two rows (primary items m1, m2) and a single column (instant period 2001-12-31 / 2002-12-31). The periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The tags are used to select the period for each row.

variation.name: Rule sets with duplicate tags
variation.description: Invalid table that has a rule node with three rule sets, two of which are tagged with 'end'.

variation.name: Rule set that lacks a constraint for an aspect
variation.description: Invalid table that has a rule node with two rule sets tagged with 'start' and 'end'. The 'start' rule set constrains both the period aspect and an explicit dimension, while the 'end' rule set only constrains period.

variation.name: Simple table with rule node that has conflicting aspect rules in the same rule set
variation.description: Table with a rule node that specifies two different values for the same aspect in the same rule set.

variation.name: Rule node with tagged and untagged rule sets for period line-up
variation.description: Simple table with three rows (primary items m1, m2, m3) and a single column (instant period 2001-12-31 / 2002-12-31 or duration period 2002-01-01 to 2002-12-31). The instant periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The tags are used to select the period for each row.

variation.name: Rule node with tagged and untagged rule sets for period line-up, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with three rows (primary items m1, m2, m3) and a single column (instant period 2001-12-31 / 2002-12-31 or duration period 2002-01-01 to 2002-12-31). The instant periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The tags are used to select the period for each row.

variation.name: Multiple rules nodes with tagged rule sets
variation.description: Simple table with three rows (primary items m1, m2, m3), two columns (period line-up for 2002 and 2003) and a single slice (entity identifier old scheme/new scheme). The instant periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The old scheme entity identifier is tagged with 'oldID'.

variation.name: Multiple rules nodes with tagged rule sets, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with three rows (primary items m1, m2, m3), two columns (period line-up for 2002 and 2003) and a single slice (entity identifier old scheme/new scheme). The instant periods are tagged with 'start' / 'end' tags. The old scheme entity identifier is tagged with 'oldID'.

variation.name: Constraint sets and tags on the same axis
variation.description: A table that has nodes with constraint sets and nodes with tag selectors on the same axis.

variation.name: Constraint sets and tags on the same axis, with instance
variation.description: A table that has nodes with constraint sets and nodes with tag selectors on the same axis.

variation.name: Table with nodes that have tag selectors that clash
variation.description: Table with two rule nodes that specify tag selectors that clash ('start' and 'end').

variation.name: Table with tag selectors that do not match any of the constraint sets on another node
variation.description: Table with a tag selector ('unmatched') that does not match the tags ('start', 'end') of the constraint sets on the other node in the table.
